text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Mejiro Ardan<n>browsing the
general goods corner of<n>the school store.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Playing cards, Othello...<n>Marbles? Oh,
which one would be the<n>most fun?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'm sorry, I didn't mean to speak<n>out loud...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Um... I hate to ask this out of the blue,<n>but... do
you know of any games that<n>are fun to play
indoors?
choice_data_list: Are you only looking for indoor activities?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. To be honest, my body is quite<n>frail, so my
friends are hesitant to<n>invite me out for things.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Because of that, I'd like to find<n>something I can
easily play so I can<n>invite them myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
However, I really don't know what's<n>popular
nowadays... What do you<n>think would be good?
choice_data_list: Why not film videos for Umatok?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Karuta? Ooh, I haven't played that in<n>years. I
used to do One Hundred<n>Poets, One Poem Each
all the time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Do people still enjoy playing karuta,<n>though? It's
not a very contemporary<n>game, after all...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I glance over the shelves and happen<n>to see a
karuta set with a unique<n>theme. I take a pack of
the cards<n>down and offer it to her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Huh, what's this? Legendary<n>Umamusume
Karuta?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Includes all the Umamusume of the<n>past and
present! Wow! I never knew<n>they sold versions
like this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... What do they have for "O"?<n>Oh, here it is.
"Oguri Cap, Kasamatsu's<n>Gray Cinderella."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Pfft! Hehehe! I wonder if they have a<n>card about
me in here?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure my friends will love this!<n>Thank you for
telling me about it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure this will help us create<n>plenty of
memories. Hopefully this will<n>make up for all the
days I couldn't<n>spend time with them.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A beautiful smile spreads across<n>Mejiro
Ardan's face as she murmurs<n>her heartfelt wish.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Umatok? I've only heard about it in<n>passing from
my classmates...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind showing me how to<n>make a
video?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Lovey-dovey love! ♪ Bang! ♪ Straight<n>into your
heart! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Straight, um... Straight into your heart!<n>♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Am I doing it right? This is quite<n>embarrassing, I
have to say...
choice_data_list: Hang on. I need to edit it real quick.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! How fun. I can't believe this is<n>what's
popular nowadays.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But this way, I can have fun with<n>everyone even
from my room!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan smiles widely as if she<n>can barely
contain her excitement.
